result:
The cleaned data has been successfully written to data/output/cleaned_data.csv with 16111 rows and 15 columns. The file includes:

1. NSID - the cohort member identifier
2. Age-specific sexuality variables with harmonized categories:
   - sori14, sori14_lbl (Age 14)
   - sori17, sori17_lbl (Age 17)
   - sori19, sori19_lbl (Age 19)
   - sori20, sori20_lbl (Age 20)
   - sori_wave8, sori_wave8_lbl (Wave 8/Self-Completion)
   - sori_wave9, sori_wave9_lbl (Wave 9/Age 32)
3. Consolidated sori variable - uses most recent valid response (time-varying)
4. Consolidated sori_lbl with labels for all values

Missing value codes have been harmonized:
- -9 = Refusal
- -8 = Don't know/insufficient information
- -7 = Prefer not to say
- -1 = Not applicable
- -3 = Not asked at fieldwork stage
- -2 = Schedule not applicable

Response categories harmonized to: 1=Heterosexual/Straight, 2=Gay/Lesbian, 3=Bisexual, 4=Other, 5=Prefer not to say
